CustomField.formula:
CASE(Cost_Allocation_Unit__r.PR_PO_Admin__c , "a16GB000007ZNeh", "Amy Webster", "a16GB000007ZNbJ", "Beau Cramer", "a160o000002lPPj", "Brooke Goodhew", "a16GB000006h4xh", "Jana Hockey", "a160o000006is4u", "Madeline Whiley", "a16GB000007ZNeS", "Priscilla Cicero", "a1690000002iwkR", "Stacey Lowry", "a160o000007vtYc", "Toni Herberts", "a1690000000B1hu", "Gina Tedford", "a160o000007m2yb", "Charlie Rose Wagstaff", "a160o000007m0om", "Natalie Smith", "a1690000002YWzy", "Katherine Zappala", "a16On000000mxc5", "Celine Duggan",
"Get SF Admin to Update")
CustomField.label: PR/PO Admin
